hero.title: Taverna de la Sal
hero.subtitle: Six intimate rooms just steps from the sea. Calm, history and disconnection in the heart of the Costa Brava.

story.title: A 19th-century building linked to the sea and salt
story.text: This century-old building, connected to the maritime and salt-making tradition of L'Escala, has been carefully restored to become an adults-only boutique hotel and a Mediterranean restaurant that respects its original essence.

refuge.eyebrow: YOUR REFUGE ON THE COSTA BRAVA
refuge.title: Why choose Taverna de la Sal

cards.title: Total exclusivity
cards.text: Six rooms and an adults-only atmosphere that guarantees tranquility and uninterrupted rest.

cards.title: By the sea and old town
cards.text: Privileged location between the Mediterranean and the cobbled streets of L'Escala’s historic center.

cards.title: Personal hospitality
cards.text: Run by its owners, who care for every detail to make your stay unforgettable.

atmosphere.title: Light, detail and calm
atmosphere.text: From the Mediterranean light to the carefully designed interiors, every space invites you to disconnect.

cards.title: 10% restaurant discount
cards.text: Enjoy our charcoal-grill cuisine with an exclusive discount for direct bookings.

cards.title: Best rate guaranteed
cards.text: By booking directly you will always get the best available price.

cards.title: Personalized service
cards.text: Direct contact with the owners to tailor your stay.

rooms.title: Rooms with Mediterranean views
rooms.text: Double spaces between 25 and 30 m², with private balcony and side sea views. Decorated with natural materials, soft light and a palette of sand and blue tones that bring balance and harmony.
features: Mediterranean buffet breakfast included every morning
Daily housekeeping and attention to detail
rooms.imageAlt: Room with balcony and Mediterranean views

restaurant.title: Charcoal grill, produce and the Mediterranean
restaurant.text: Our restaurant offers honest cuisine based on charcoal-grilled meats and fish, seasonal produce and a selection of DO Empordà wines. An intimate setting by the sea to enjoy the best local gastronomy.
restaurant.imageAlt: Table on the restaurant terrace with sea views

area.title: L’Escala, Costa Brava
area.text: An authentic fishing village on the Costa Brava, where the Greco-Roman heritage of Empúries coexists with crystal-clear beaches, hidden coves and a unique gastronomic tradition marked by the famous anchovies of L'Escala.
area.imageAlt: Aerial view of L’Escala on the Costa Brava

items.quote: “Personality, comfort and genuine warmth. Carefully designed rooms, impeccable cleanliness and a Rooftop terrace perfect for sunset. An exceptional breakfast and service that truly makes the difference.”
items.name: Emanuel P.

items.quote: “It’s amazing how quiet and peaceful this hotel is. The rooms are looked after to the maximum, the beds are very comfortable and everything is super clean. The breakfast is very high quality.”
items.name: Cristian V.

items.quote: “Perfect location right next to the harbour. Lovely hosts. Stylish rooms, excellent breakfast and a restaurant with a truly local atmosphere”
items.name: Anna K.

cta.title: Your refuge by the Mediterranean awaits
cta.text: Book directly and enjoy an intimate, authentic and unforgettable experience in the heart of L’Escala.

hero.title: Boutique rooms in L'Escala
hero.subtitle: Bright, welcoming spaces designed for real rest, in an adults-only hotel by the sea.

intro.title: Only for those who value the details
intro.lead: Unique rooms between 25 and 30 m², designed for those who understand rest as an experience of calm, light and care by the Mediterranean.
list: All double rooms with a double bed
Two of them can be adapted to a triple on request
With balcony and side sea views
intro.quote: An exclusive refuge for couples looking for detail, privacy and design facing the Mediterranean.
intro.imageAlt: Room with bathroom and natural light

features.title: Details that make the difference
items: Kettle with a selection of coffee and tea

gallery.title: Every detail, chosen with intention.
gallery.subtitle: A visual journey through spaces where design, comfort and calm meet.

final.title: Few rooms guarantee a quiet and exclusive atmosphere throughout the season.

services.text: In addition to your room, you can enjoy our sea-view terrace and charcoal-grill restaurant.

items.a: Yes. Taverna de la Sal is an adults-only hotel, for guests over 14 years old, designed to offer a calm and relaxed atmosphere throughout your stay.

items.q: Is breakfast included in the stay?
items.a: Yes, daily breakfast with local products is included in all reservations.
Yes. We offer nearby private parking with limited spaces. Advance reservation is required and it has an additional cost.

items.q: What are check-in and check-out times?
items.a: Check-in is available from 15:00 to 19:00 and check-out is at 11:00.

items.q: Is the rooftop terrace open to everyone?
items.a: The terrace is for hotel guests only and is reserved for adults.
Unfortunately, pets are not allowed on the property.

items.q: Can you smoke in the rooms?
items.a: No. All our rooms and indoor spaces are 100% smoke-free. If you wish, you can smoke on the terrace.

seo.title: Services | Taverna de la Sal
seo.description: Hotel services: charcoal-grill restaurant, breakfast with local products, terrace with Mediterranean views, reading corner, parking and Wi-Fi.

hero.title: Services that complete your experience
hero.subtitle: Every detail has been designed so your stay at Taverna de la Sal is comfortable, peaceful and worry-free.
hero.note: ✓ 10% discount for hotel guests who book directly on our website

brasa.title: Charcoal-grill restaurant
brasa.text1: Specialists in charcoal-grilled meats and fish, with seasonal produce and an intimate atmosphere in the old town of L'Escala.
brasa.text2: If you book directly on our website, you will enjoy a 10% discount in the restaurant during your stay.

breakfast.title: Start the day with flavor
breakfast.text: Every morning we serve a carefully curated, elegant buffet breakfast with fresh local products: freshly baked bread and pastries, seasonal fruit, local cold cuts and cheeses, accompanied by fresh orange juice and coffee prepared on the spot. A calm start to the day, in a Mediterranean setting just steps from the sea.

terrace.title: Rooftop terrace with Mediterranean views.
terrace.text: Our Rooftop offers views of the bay and the old town. Cocktails, calm and unforgettable sunsets.

reading.title: Reading corner
reading.text: A small quiet space to relax, read or simply pause time. We have books and magazines about L'Escala, the sea and local history.

cards.title: Comfort without worries
cards.text: Daily housekeeping service to ensure freshness and comfort. Extra towels and amenities available upon request.

cards.title: Parking in the heart of the village
cards.text: Private parking space near the hotel. Limited spaces, advance reservation and additional cost. A rare luxury in a coastal town like L'Escala.

cards.title: High-speed Wi-Fi
cards.text: Connection available in all rooms and common areas so you can plan your day or share your experience.

final.title: Small hotel, close attention and services designed so you only have to focus on enjoying.

hero.title: Two seas, one way of caring
hero.subtitle: A story that connects New Zealand and the Mediterranean through genuine hospitality.
hero.cta: I want to live the experience

block1.kicker: Taverna de la Sal was not born as a business project.
block1.p1: It was born as a way of living. Matthew arrived from New Zealand with a very clear idea: hospitality is not a service, it is a way of being present. For years he has worked in hospitality and learned that silent details are the ones people truly remember.
block1.p2: Mariona grew up in L’Escala. She knows the rhythm of the sea, the character of the village and that Mediterranean way of caring that blends closeness and calm.
quoteLines: One same way of understanding genuine care.

block2.title: A building that already had a story
block2.p1: The building that is now Taverna de la Sal was born in the 19th century. For decades it was linked to the sea and salt. First it was a refuge for fishermen, then a place that welcomed the first travelers who discovered the Costa Brava.
block2.p2: Over time, the project grew. We decided to restore the building respecting its essence and transform it into an adults-only boutique hotel.
block2.p3: We didn’t want to create just another hotel, but an intimate space where every stay feels personal.
block2.p4: Today, Taverna de la Sal is the result of a union: tradition and a contemporary взгляд, roots and world, sea and hospitality.

philosophy.title: Our philosophy
philosophy.p1: We believe true luxury is human: being present, calling each guest by name and caring for every detail so you can truly disconnect.
philosophy.p2: "For us, hospitality is not a service, it is a way of loving what we do." Mariona and Matthew

final.textLine1: If you decide to stay with us, you are not just booking a room.
final.textLine2: You become part of a story that began long before your arrival.

hero.title: Explore L'Escala and the Costa Brava
hero.subtitle: Nature, history and sea just steps from the hotel.

intro.imageAlt: Detail of the maritime tradition in L'Escala
intro.title: History, culture and gastronomy by the Mediterranean
intro.lead: A destination where the sea is not only contemplated, it is also remembered.
intro.p1: L'Escala is tied to the Mediterranean and the salt trade.
intro.p2: Just a few minutes away are the Empúries Ruins, where Greek and Roman cities coexisted by the sea.
intro.p3: Maritime tradition, heritage and local cuisine complete the experience.

header.title: Archaeology and heritage
header.subtitle: Traces of ancient civilizations within easy reach.

cards.title: Empúries ruins
cards.text: Temples, mosaics and archaeological remains with Mediterranean views. A journey to ancient Greece and Rome just minutes from the hotel.

cards.title: Old Town of L'Escala
cards.text: Cobbled streets, local shops and authentic maritime essence.

cards.title: Alfolí de la Sal
cards.text: Former 18th-century warehouse that tells the story of the town’s commercial past.

cards.title: Anchovy and Salt Museum
cards.text: Discover the fishing legacy that brought L'Escala international fame.

banner.title: The Mediterranean, just a few steps away

beaches.intro: From the hotel you can walk out and be by the sea in seconds.

items.title: Platja de les Barques
items.text: Small beach right in front of the hotel. Ideal for an early swim.

items.title: Port d'en Perris
items.text: Rocky cove in the old town, clear waters and an intimate setting.

items.title: Empúries beaches
items.text: Fine sand next to the Greco-Roman ruins.

items.title: Cala Montgó
items.text: Sheltered bay with turquoise waters surrounded by nature.

beaches.linkText: Discover all the beaches of L'Escala

nature.title: Open landscapes, fresh air and silence
nature.p1: The Empordà is a land of contrasts: sea, cliffs, wetlands and gentle mountains that invite you to explore without haste.

items.title: Montgrí Natural Park, Medes Islands and Baix Ter
items.text: Trails with sea views, hidden coves and protected marine reserves.

items.title: Aiguamolls de l'Empordà
items.text: Wetlands ideal for peaceful walks and birdwatching.

items.title: Seafront promenade and the Portitxol Arch
items.text: Follow the Camí de Ronda along cliffs and wooden walkways to one of the most photogenic natural arches on the Costa Brava.

nature.note: Perfect for guests who want to combine rest with active nature.

experiences.title: Live the destination, not just visit it

items.title: Water activities
items.text: Diving, snorkeling, kayaking and paddleboarding in crystal-clear waters.

items.title: Boat trips
items.text: Private or group excursions to discover the coast from the sea.

items.title: Cycling routes
items.text: Coastal and rural itineraries with Mediterranean landscapes.

items.title: Hiking
items.text: Explore the Montgrí massif or the Camí de Ronda.

items.title: Culture and getaways
items.text: Dalí Theatre-Museum (Figueres), DO Empordà wineries and local tradition.

food.title: Flavors of the Empordà
food.p1: L'Escala is known for its artisan anchovies, made using traditional methods that are part of Mediterranean identity.
food.p2: Catalan cuisine combines sea and mountains, local recipes and wines with the Empordà designation of origin.
food.p3: At Taverna de la Sal, this tradition is enjoyed at our table, with local produce and authentic flavors that complete your stay.
food.italic: Discover the Empordà through the sea, history and also through taste.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: In compliance with Article 22.2 of Law 34/2002 (LSSI-CE), this document informs about the use of cookies on the website [DOMAIN].

s1.title: 1. What are cookies?
s1.p1: Cookies are small text files that are stored in the user's browser when visiting a website. They are used to facilitate navigation, remember preferences and, in some cases, obtain statistical information.

tech.title: Technical cookies (necessary)
tech.p1: They are essential for the proper functioning of the website, such as managing navigation or accessing secure areas. They do not require prior consent.

analytics.title: Analytics cookies
analytics.p1: They allow measuring traffic and analyzing site usage to improve the experience and services offered. They require consent.

third.title: Third-party cookies
third.p1: The site may integrate external services (for example, maps or analytics tools) that may install their own cookies. Processing is governed by the policy of the corresponding provider.

s3.title: 3. Legal basis
s3.p1: The legal basis for the use of non-essential cookies is the user's consent, granted through the banner or configuration panel. Consent can be withdrawn at any time.

s4.title: 4. How to configure or disable cookies
s4.p1: The user can allow, block or delete cookies through the browser settings:
s4.p2: Disabling certain cookies may affect the proper functioning of the website.

s5.title: 5. Identification of the controller

s6.title: 6. More information

seo.title: Restaurant | Taverna de la Sal
seo.description: Charcoal-grilled meats and fish with sea views. Honest cooking, seasonal produce and Empordà wines.

whatsapp.text: Hi, I’d like to book a table at the restaurant. Can you confirm availability? Thank you.

hero.title: Charcoal Grill and Mediterranean cooking
hero.subtitle: Local produce, sea cuisine and carefully selected cuts, in a proposal designed to share and enjoy at a relaxed pace.
hero.note: 10% discount for guests who book directly on our website.

propuesta.title: Charcoal grill as the protagonist
propuesta.lead: We work with selected meats and fresh fish, respecting the product and charcoal-grill technique. Honest cooking, defined flavors and Mediterranean recipes made without artifice.
propuesta.p2: Local produce, Empordà wines and a menu to enjoy without rush.

entorno.title: Just steps from the Mediterranean
entorno.p1: A cozy indoor dining room and a terrace designed to enjoy without rushing. A place to have lunch and dinner calmly, whether you are a guest or a visitor.
entorno.p2: In summer, live music and sunset cocktails.
entorno.p3: In winter, a fireplace and long after-dinner conversations.
entorno.p4: A space designed to dine at a relaxed pace, whether you are a guest or a visitor.

experiencia.title: Cuisine and service with identity
experiencia.lead: It’s about enjoying fire, the sea and time.
experiencia.p2: Run and attended by its owner, the restaurant maintains a close and authentic approach, where many return not only for the cuisine, but for how they feel at the table

ventajas.title: Benefits for our guests
